title: AZ-104: Implement and manage storage in Azure
summary: AZ-104: Implement and manage storage in Azure

sections.title: AZ-104: Implement and manage storage in Azure
sections.summary: AZ-104: Implement and manage storage in Azure

lessons.title: Configure storage accounts
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to configure storage accounts, including replication and endpoints.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-storage-accounts/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Configure Azure Blob Storage
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to configure Azure Blob Storage, including tiers and object replication.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-blob-storage/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Configure Azure Storage security
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to configure common Azure Storage security features like storage access signatures.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-storage-security/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Configure Azure Files
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to configure Azure Files for cloud file shares.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-azure-files-file-sync/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica AZ-104: Implement and manage storage in Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **AZ-104: Implement and manage storage in Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
